title: Pan's Better Sniffer Egg
description: Makes the Sniffer Egg fit Minecraft in a way that isn't out of place
body:
The Sniffer Egg looks like a stretched rugby ball that has been retextured and just placed into a 16 x 16 grid


However I decided that The Sniffer Egg deserves better, So I did what I could to make The Sniffer Egg better 

I feel that this pack makes The Sniffer Egg more fitting for Minecraft
